about.title: Who am I?
about.bio1: My name is Paulo Vitor, but you can call me PV. A developer passionate about software engineering. I seek to understand everything I can in this vast world of technology.
about.bio2: In this space I share what I learn, experiment with, and build. From personal projects, technical content to recommendations and hobbies.

footer.tagline: Sharing everything that was shared with me.
footer.copyright: Forged in the depths of code
